vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present but in a state of severe decline. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

plant_audit.p1: Yellow pot contains only substrate; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.p2: Black pot contains only substrate; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.p3: Pothos specimen shows severe chlorosis and structural collapse. The single remaining leaf is necrotic/wilting. The white rabbit anchor remains.
plant_audit.p4: No evidence of the Silver Guest specimen.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Substrate appears consistently dark and potentially waterlogged or compacted.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the P3 pot (New Intervention). Debris on the desk surface (electronic component/connector) is an external anomaly.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-3: Initial state shows a single green leaf in P3. P1 and P2 pots are empty.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Significant postural collapse of the P3 leaf; it is losing turgor pressure.
temporal_deltas.current: The P3 leaf has shriveled significantly, indicating near-total senescence or terminal dehydration.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal collapse. The P3 specimen is the only remaining biological entity, and it is currently non-viable.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells in P3 pot (likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrent).
Electronic component (connector) on the desk surface.
White object (possibly a charging case) introduced in the final frame.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the expected biome. Only one Pothos leaf remains in the P3 pot, which has transitioned from a healthy, turgid state to a shriveled, necrotic state over the 5-day observation period. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) are devoid of plant life, suggesting either total mortality or failure to germinate. The introduction of eggshells suggests an intervention that failed to arrest the decline.
